title: ColdTom's Pumpkin craft
description: Increase the color richness of Minecraft
body:
_Pumpkin Craft_.

_Author: ColdTom(BiliBili冰冷汤姆森)_.

![1_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b81d9fe365902d94275637f7ba57626339d1f0a.png)



_Directions for use_.

_1.You need [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)_ .

_2.On fabric. you need [continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity). and [CIT-Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)._



_Thanks for download_.
